starting_cell.name: Starting Cell
starting_cell.description: A cold, damp stone chamber with rusted chains hanging from the walls. A small shaft of dim light filters through a grate high above.

south.locked_message: A heavy iron gate blocks your path to the south. There is a rusted keyhole.

hermit_cave.name: Hermit's Cave
hermit_cave.description: A cozy cave illuminated by a flickering campfire. Bookshelves and alchemical jars line the stone walls.

damp_cavern.name: Damp Cavern
damp_cavern.description: Water drops loudly from stalactites onto the wet stone floor. The air smells of moss and decay.

safe_haven.name: Safe Haven
safe_haven.description: A clean and warm chamber. Banners of forgotten kingdoms hang from the ceiling. A merchant has set up a small wooden stall here.

old_armory.name: Old Armory
old_armory.description: Racks of rusted shields and broken weapons line the walls. A dusty iron chest sits in the center of the room.

puzzles.question: I speak without a mouth and hear without ears. I have no body, but I come alive with wind. What am I?
puzzles.solved_message: The heavy iron lock clicks open! Inside you find an Iron Sword, Leather Armor, and a Health Potion.

crypt_hall.name: Crypt Hallway
crypt_hall.description: A grand hallway lined with stone sarcophagi. A cold, ghostly mist hangs in the air, chilling you to the bone.

south.locked_message: An obsidian door with ancient glyphs blocks the southern path. It has a keyhole shaped like a skull.

shadow_caverns.name: Shadow Caverns
shadow_caverns.description: A pitch-black cavern where even your torchlight seems dim. Eerie whispers echo from the dark corners.

dragon_sanctum.name: Dragon's Sanctum
dragon_sanctum.description: A massive volcanic cavern filled with piles of gold and jewels. In the center, a huge red dragon sleeps, guarding a glowing golden portal.
